nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 鹱形目
nodes.summary: 鹱形目（Procellariiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联115种鸟类，如加岛信天翁、短尾信天翁、Northern royal albatross等115种鸟类。

nodes.name: 短尾信天翁
nodes.summary: 短尾信天翁（Short-tailed albatross，学名 Phoebastria albatrus），分类上属于鹱形目，并归入信天翁科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于西北夏威夷群島，主要威胁包括外来捕食者。

nodes.name: 西北夏威夷群島
nodes.summary: 西北夏威夷群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括短尾信天翁、黑腹军舰鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 信天翁科
nodes.summary: 信天翁科（Diomedeidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联16种鸟类，如加岛信天翁、短尾信天翁、Northern royal albatross等16种鸟类。

links.key: bird-短尾信天翁-e3d874eb__distributed_in__loc-西北夏威夷群島-87311244
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Both Midway and Kure are in the Northwestern Hawaiian Islands.{{cite web |title=Nest of endangered albatross found in Hawaii

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Varieties of albatross decoys were placed around on the island after it was discovered that like other albatross species, this species also were enticed to breed if placed in a group. Between 2008 and 2012, the Ministry of the Environment relocated 70 albatross chicks from Tori-shima to Mukojima to breed them artificially. Today, longline fisheries and volcanic eruptions on Tori-shima are the largest threats; however, introduced predators, environmental contaminants, soil instability, and extreme weather are also threats
